name: Bankruptcy Law Firm of Jasmine Firooz
description_short: Los Angeles bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings with 29+ years of experience. Offers free consultations, flat fees, and payment plans.
description_long:
Bankruptcy Law Firm of Jasmine Firooz is a debt relief agency based in Los Angeles, California that has been practicing bankruptcy law since 1993. The firm is led by attorney Jasmine Firooz and focuses exclusively on bankruptcy representation in the U.S. Bankruptcy Court, Central District of California. According to their website, they have successfully represented thousands of individuals over nearly three decades.

The firm offers comprehensive bankruptcy filing services including Chapter 7 debt elimination and Chapter 13 repayment plan filings. They provide free initial consultations with the attorney (not paralegals or secretaries), flat-fee pricing structures, and convenient payment plans for legal services. They advertise same-day emergency filing capability and weekend appointment availability. The firm serves clients throughout Southern California from their main Los Angeles office at 1605 W. Olympic Blvd, with an additional Orange County location in Irvine.

Key distinguishing factors include their emphasis on direct attorney consultation, affordable pricing structure with payment plans, and their exclusive focus on bankruptcy law rather than general practice. They market themselves as a debt relief agency and emphasize their ability to stop creditor harassment, halt foreclosures, prevent repossessions, and address wage garnishments, lawsuits, and IRS matters through bankruptcy filings.

The firm operates with straightforward marketing focused on accessibility and affordability. However, as with all bankruptcy representation, outcomes depend heavily on individual financial circumstances and the chapter filed. The website contains some minor inconsistencies (listing both 28 and 29 years of experience) and relies heavily on testimonial-style marketing language.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free initial consultation with the attorney directly, not staff
29+ years of exclusive specialization in bankruptcy law
Flat-fee pricing with convenient payment plans available
Claims to have handled thousands of successful bankruptcy cases
Represents clients in both Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings
cons: Website contains minor inconsistencies (28 vs. 29 years experience listed in different places)
Marketing relies heavily on debt relief agency language that may oversimplify bankruptcy outcomes
No specific pricing information provided on website; clients must contact for flat-fee quotes
Limited information about attorney credentials, bar status, or specific experience breakdown
No recent testimonials or case results published on website
best_for: Southern California residents facing foreclosure, repossession, or wage garnishment seeking immediate bankruptcy relief
Debtors seeking direct attorney consultation rather than paralegal-led firms
Individuals needing affordable, flat-fee bankruptcy representation with flexible payment options
diagnosis: Best for Southern California residents in financial crisis who want direct attorney representation and flat-fee pricing for Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 filings. Primary caveat: bankruptcy is a serious legal proceeding with long-term credit consequences; this firm provides legal representation but cannot guarantee outcomes, and suitability depends entirely on individual financial circumstances and assets.
services: Creditor harassment cessation and legal notice
U.S. Bankruptcy Court representation in Central District of California
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1605 W Olympic Blvd Ste 9021, Los Angeles, CA 90015
